title: Coordinates
description: Adds a handful of commands making it much easier to share your coordinates. Useful for SMPs or playing with friends.
body:
# Coordinates
This mod aims to make it much easier to manage and share your coordinates by allowing you to send them in chat to everyone or to yourself with a simple command.

- /coordinates - Displays your current coordinates in chat to yourself.
- /sendcoordinates - Sends the coordinates in chat for everyone to see.
